emails.theme: Disposable Prices Have Surged. Here's What That Means for You.
emails.shortDescription: Disposables that used to cost ~$470/year now run $962 to $1,920. Prices climbed and they're not coming back down. Side-by-side annual cost comparison: disposables vs. Wearever. One pair lasts up to 200+ washes. Show the math. Position Wearever as the smarter financial move.
emails.notes: Lead email for June. Data-driven. End with 'make the switch' CTA.
emails.creativeDirection: Data-driven layout. Big cost numbers in Golden (#F89F48) on Navy (#1A2450). Side-by-side comparison visual. Clean, authoritative.

emails.theme: Signs It's Time to Upgrade Your Absorbency Level
emails.shortDescription: Help customers recognize when their current absorbency isn't enough: frequent changes, feeling damp, avoiding outings. Guide them from Regular to Super or Maximum. The wrong absorbency level means you're not solving the problem. Upgrading changes your daily experience completely.
emails.notes: Soft upsell. Genuinely helpful, not pushy. Specific product recommendations.
emails.creativeDirection: Helpful, empathetic tone. Visual cues (checkmarks, signs). Both gender palettes.

emails.theme: Summer Plans? Don't Let Leaks Change Them.
emails.shortDescription: Road trips, pool days, outdoor events, long walks in the heat. Practical advice: pack a spare pair, choose the right absorbency for your activity level, why reusable beats disposable when traveling. Summer is when you need dependable protection most.
emails.notes: Seasonal content. Positions Wearever as part of an active lifestyle, not a medical product.
emails.creativeDirection: Bright summer imagery. Lifestyle-forward. Warm Golden accents on white.

emails.theme: Can You Actually Retrain Your Bladder? (Yes. Here's How.)
emails.shortDescription: Introduce bladder retraining: gradually increasing time between bathroom visits. How it works, who it helps, how to start. Retraining takes time and you need reliable protection while you work on it. Wearever keeps you covered during the process.
emails.creativeDirection: Educational layout. Clean, trustworthy. Navy/Ice palette.

emails.theme: 20% Off All Men's Styles. This Weekend Only.
emails.shortDescription: Father's Day Weekend Sale. 20% off every men's product, June 20-21 only. Auto discount at checkout, no code. Showcase men's bestsellers right after the offer. Directed at the man himself. NOT a gifting email. Cannot be combined with other coupons or offers.
emails.notes: Sale directed at the buyer himself. 'Treat yourself' framing, not 'gift for dad.' June 20-21 only. Products right after the offer.
emails.offerCode: 20% off all men's items. Auto discount at checkout, no code needed.
emails.creativeDirection: Navy/Golden palette. Bold '20% OFF' hero. Men's bestsellers integrated into sale layout. Masculine, confident. Not gift-focused.

emails.theme: Last Chance. 20% Off Men's Styles Ends at 11:59 PM Tonight.
emails.shortDescription: Final push. Same 20% off all men's items, ends at 11:59 PM today. Showcase men's bestsellers right after the offer. Sizes are running low. Cannot be combined with other coupons or offers.
emails.notes: Final push. Limited sizes angle. Sale ends tonight. Products right after the offer.
emails.creativeDirection: Urgency-driven. Red CTA. 'LAST CALL' top bar. Navy background. Men's bestsellers integrated.

emails.theme: The Styles Women Come Back For (Again and Again)
emails.shortDescription: Most reordered women's styles. What makes each one different: absorbency level (10 oz vs 20 oz), cut (full cut vs mid-rise), what activities each is best for. Different color variant per product. These are the proven sellers women keep reordering because they actually work.
emails.notes: Post-sale. Curated 'these are the ones' showcase, not a catalog dump.
emails.creativeDirection: Blackberry/Plum palette. Different color per product. Clean, feminine, confident.

emails.theme: Regular vs. Super vs. Maximum: Which One's Right for You?
emails.shortDescription: Visual comparison of all three absorbency levels. Side-by-side: Regular (5 oz, light leaks, everyday), Super (10 oz, moderate, active days), Maximum (20 oz, heavy). Most people are guessing at their absorbency level. This removes the guesswork.
emails.notes: Conversion-focused. Helps confused shoppers choose confidently. Both men's and women's styles shown.
emails.creativeDirection: Clean comparison layout. Visual side-by-side grid. Both gender palettes. Conversion-focused.
